proposed_hypotheses.text: In ds001_nsclc, older age (age_years) is associated with longer pfs_months in a multivariable adjusted model.
Female sex (sex_female=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than male sex in a multivariable adjusted model.
Current smoking status (smoking_status='current') is associated with shorter pfs_months than former smoking, in a multivariable adjusted model.
Higher ECOG performance status (ecog_ps) is associated with shorter pfs_months in a multivariable adjusted model.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ all base predictors; coef on age_years
analyses.result_summary: age_years coefficient = +0.1684 months PFS per year (p=0.00e+00); each additional year adds ~0.17 months PFS — highly significant and large.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ all base predictors; coef on sex_female
analyses.result_summary: sex_female coefficient = -0.2036 months (p=1.64e-210); females have ~0.20 months shorter PFS in adjusted model.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ all base predictors; coef on smoke_current
analyses.result_summary: smoke_current coefficient = -0.5456 months vs. never reference (p=0.00e+00); current smokers have ~0.55 months shorter PFS than never-smokers in adjusted model.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ all base predictors; coef on ecog_ps
analyses.result_summary: ecog_ps coefficient = -1.1013 months per grade (p=0.00e+00); each ECOG grade reduces PFS by ~1.10 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Stage IV disease (stage_iv=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than non-stage-IV in adjusted model.
Presence of brain metastases (has_brain_mets=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months in adjusted model.
Squamous histology (histology='squamous') is associated with shorter pfs_months than adenocarcinoma in adjusted model.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ all base; coef stage_iv
analyses.result_summary: stage_iv coefficient = -1.4168 months (p=0.00e+00); stage IV reduces PFS by ~1.42 months adjusted.
has_brain_mets coefficient = -0.9122 (p=0.00e+00); brain mets reduce PFS by ~0.91 months.
hist_squam coefficient = -0.7228 (p=0.00e+00); squamous reduces PFS by ~0.72 months adjusted.

proposed_hypotheses.text: egfr_mutation status has a non-zero adjusted main effect on pfs_months.
kras_g12c=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than kras_g12c=0 in adjusted model.
alk_fusion=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than alk_fusion=0 in adjusted model.
stk11_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than stk11_mutation=0 in adjusted model.
brca2_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than brca2_mutation=0 in adjusted model.
Higher pdl1_tps is associated with non-zero change in pfs_months in adjusted model.
tmb_high=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than tmb_high=0 in adjusted model.

analyses.result_summary: pdl1_tps adjusted coefficient = +0.0058 months per unit TPS (p=7.07e-01); essentially null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months in adjusted model.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months in adjusted model.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months in adjusted model.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with non-zero change in pfs_months in adjusted model.
Higher nlr (neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with non-zero change in pfs_months in adjusted model.
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months in adjusted model.
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months in adjusted model.
Higher creatinine_mg_dl is associated with non-zero change in pfs_months in adjusted model.
Higher calcium_mg_dl is associated with non-zero change in pfs_months in adjusted model.
treatment_pembrolizumab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_pembrolizumab=0 in unadjusted comparison.
treatment_sotorasib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_sotorasib=0 in unadjusted comparison.
treatment_olaparib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_olaparib=0 in unadjusted comparison.
treatment_osimertinib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_osimertinib=0 in unadjusted comparison.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS on treatment_pembrolizumab: 3.414 vs off 3.449, diff=-0.035 months (Welch t p=8.11e-02; n_on=25008, n_off=24992).
Mean PFS on treatment_sotorasib: 3.641 vs off 3.319, diff=+0.322 months (Welch t p=5.62e-49; n_on=17544, n_off=32456).
Mean PFS on treatment_olaparib: 3.414 vs off 3.439, diff=-0.025 months (Welch t p=2.56e-01; n_on=14999, n_off=35001).
Mean PFS on treatment_osimertinib: 3.434 vs off 3.431, diff=+0.004 months (Welch t p=8.70e-01; n_on=14976, n_off=35024).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Adjusted main effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months is non-zero in multivariable model.
Adjusted main effect of treatment_sotorasib on pfs_months is positive in multivariable model.
Adjusted main effect of treatment_olaparib on pfs_months is non-zero in multivariable model.
Adjusted main effect of treatment_osimertinib on pfs_months is non-zero in multivariable model.
treatment_pembrolizumab × pdl1_tps interaction on pfs_months is positive (greater pembrolizumab benefit at higher pdl1_tps).
treatment_sotorasib × kras_g12c interaction on pfs_months is positive (sotorasib benefit larger in KRAS-G12C+).
treatment_osimertinib × egfr_mutation interaction on pfs_months is positive (osimertinib benefit larger in EGFR+).
treatment_olaparib × brca2_mutation interaction on pfs_months is positive (olaparib benefit larger in BRCA2+).
Among PD-L1 high patients (pdl1_tps>=0.5), treatment_pembrolizumab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_pembrolizumab=0.
Among PD-L1 low patients (pdl1_tps<0.5), treatment_pembrolizumab does not affect pfs_months.
Among tmb_high=1 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_pembrolizumab=0.

analyses.code: PFS by pembro within pdl1_tps>=0.5 (Welch t)
analyses.result_summary: In PD-L1 high (n_on=5342, n_off=5407): pembro on - off = -0.070 months (p=1.06e-01); benefit not seen.

analyses.code: PFS by pembro within pdl1_tps<0.5 (Welch t)
analyses.result_summary: In PD-L1 low (n_on=19666, n_off=19585): pembro on - off = -0.025 months (p=2.64e-01); null.

analyses.code: PFS by pembro within tmb_high=1 (Welch t)
analyses.result_summary: In TMB-high (n_on=7111, n_off=7147): pembro on - off = -0.048 months (p=2.00e-01); null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among KRAS-G12C-positive patients, treatment_sotorasib=1 is associated with substantially longer pfs_months than treatment_sotorasib=0.
Among KRAS-G12C-negative patients, treatment_sotorasib has no effect on pfs_months.

analyses.code: Welch t test PFS by sotorasib within kras_g12c=1
analyses.result_summary: KRAS+ (n_on=2246, n_off=4122): sotorasib on PFS=5.766 vs off=3.213; diff = +2.552 months (p=1.66e-202).

analyses.code: Welch t test PFS by sotorasib within kras_g12c=0
analyses.result_summary: KRAS- (n_on=15298, n_off=28334): sotorasib on PFS=3.329 vs off=3.334; diff = -0.005 months (p=7.99e-01); null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among EGFR-mutated patients, treatment_osimertinib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_osimertinib=0.
Among BRCA2-mutated patients, treatment_olaparib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_olaparib=0.

analyses.code: Welch t test PFS by osimertinib within egfr_mutation=1
analyses.result_summary: EGFR+ (n_on=1973, n_off=4544): osimertinib on PFS=3.586 vs off=3.600; diff=-0.014 months (p=8.08e-01); essentially null.

analyses.code: Welch t test PFS by olaparib within brca2_mutation=1
analyses.result_summary: BRCA2+ (n_on=417, n_off=1102): olaparib on PFS=3.324 vs off=3.314; diff=+0.010 months (p=9.34e-01); null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable model, the treatment_pembrolizumab × nlr interaction on pfs_months is negative (interaction coefficient ~-0.009).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_pembrolizumab × stage_iv interaction on pfs_months is positive (interaction coefficient ~+0.036).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_pembrolizumab × kras_g12c interaction on pfs_months is negative (interaction coefficient ~-0.049).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_pembrolizumab × sex_female interaction on pfs_months is positive (interaction coefficient ~+0.020).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_pembrolizumab × calcium_mg_dl interaction on pfs_months is positive (interaction coefficient ~+0.016).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_sotorasib × sex_female interaction on pfs_months is negative (interaction coefficient ~-0.585).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_sotorasib × kras_g12c interaction on pfs_months is positive (interaction coefficient ~+2.535).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_sotorasib × smoke_current interaction on pfs_months is positive (interaction coefficient ~+0.254).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_sotorasib × alk_fusion interaction on pfs_months is negative (interaction coefficient ~-0.343).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_sotorasib × egfr_mutation interaction on pfs_months is negative (interaction coefficient ~-0.208).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_osimertinib × has_brain_mets interaction on pfs_months is positive (interaction coefficient ~+0.033).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_osimertinib × pdl1_tps interaction on pfs_months is negative (interaction coefficient ~-0.060).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_osimertinib × sodium_meq_l interaction on pfs_months is negative (interaction coefficient ~-0.004).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_osimertinib × alk_fusion interaction on pfs_months is positive (interaction coefficient ~+0.055).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_osimertinib × alkaline_phosphatase_u_l interaction on pfs_months is negative (interaction coefficient ~-0.000).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_olaparib × sodium_meq_l interaction on pfs_months is positive (interaction coefficient ~+0.005).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_olaparib × alkaline_phosphatase_u_l interaction on pfs_months is positive (interaction coefficient ~+0.000).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_olaparib × weight_loss_pct_6mo interaction on pfs_months is negative (interaction coefficient ~-0.003).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_olaparib × stk11_mutation interaction on pfs_months is positive (interaction coefficient ~+0.027).
In a multivariable model, the treatment_olaparib × bun_mg_dl interaction on pfs_months is negative (interaction coefficient ~-0.002).
Within KRAS-G12C-positive patients, the treatment_sotorasib × sex_female interaction on pfs_months is large and negative (much smaller benefit in females).
Within KRAS-G12C-positive patients, the treatment_sotorasib × age_years interaction is positive (slightly larger benefit at older ages).

analyses.code: OLS within KRAS+: pfs_months ~ base (no kras) + sotorasib:sex_female
analyses.result_summary: Within KRAS+ subset (n=6368), sotorasib × sex_female: coef=-4.5854, p=0.00e+00.

analyses.code: OLS within KRAS+: pfs_months ~ base (no kras) + sotorasib:age_years
analyses.result_summary: Within KRAS+ subset (n=6368), sotorasib × age_years: coef=+0.0190, p=2.58e-09.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among KRAS-G12C-positive males (kras_g12c=1, sex_female=0), treatment_sotorasib=1 is associated with markedly longer pfs_months than treatment_sotorasib=0.
Among KRAS-G12C-positive females (kras_g12c=1, sex_female=1), treatment_sotorasib does not affect pfs_months.

analyses.code: Welch t PFS by sotorasib within KRAS+ male
Welch t PFS by sotorasib within KRAS+ female
analyses.result_summary: KRAS+ female (n_on=1009, n_off=1851): on=3.179 vs off=3.191, diff=-0.012 (p=8.84e-01); null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within KRAS-G12C-positive males, the treatment_sotorasib benefit on pfs_months is present in every age quartile (Q1-Q4).

analyses.code: Welch t PFS by sotorasib within KRAS+ male age Q1
analyses.result_summary: KRAS+ male age quartile Q1 (32.3-58.5, n_on=304, n_off=582): diff=+4.072 months (p=3.33e-101).

analyses.code: Welch t PFS by sotorasib within KRAS+ male age Q2
analyses.result_summary: KRAS+ male age quartile Q2 (58.6-65.1, n_on=291, n_off=581): diff=+4.674 months (p=1.94e-161).

analyses.code: Welch t PFS by sotorasib within KRAS+ male age Q3
analyses.result_summary: KRAS+ male age quartile Q3 (65.2-72.1, n_on=313, n_off=561): diff=+4.516 months (p=6.10e-159).

analyses.code: Welch t PFS by sotorasib within KRAS+ male age Q4
analyses.result_summary: KRAS+ male age quartile Q4 (72.2-90.0, n_on=329, n_off=547): diff=+4.917 months (p=2.39e-184).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After full adjustment plus a kras_male_sotor product term, the three-way interaction (treatment_sotorasib × kras_g12c × male) on pfs_months is positive and large (~+4.5 months).
After full adjustment plus a kras_female_sotor product term, the three-way interaction (treatment_sotorasib × kras_g12c × female) on pfs_months is null.

A T-learner decision-tree uplift model identifies a top-quintile sotorasib uplift subgroup characterized by KRAS-G12C+ and male sex; observed PFS difference (on - off) in that subgroup is positive and large.

analyses.code: DecisionTreeRegressor T-learner; PFS diff in top uplift quintile
analyses.result_summary: Top uplift quintile (n=7486; KRAS+ rate=0.676, male rate=0.552): observed PFS on - off = +1.715 months (p=1.54e-147); top quintile is enriched for KRAS+ males.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Best-supported treatment-effect subgroup: the treatment_sotorasib effect on pfs_months is concentrated in patients with kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=0; outside this subgroup (either kras_g12c=0 OR sex_female=1) sotorasib has no effect on pfs_months.

analyses.code: Welch t PFS by sotorasib in KRAS+ males vs everyone else
analyses.result_summary: In KRAS+ males (n=3508): sotorasib diff = +4.644 months (p=0.00e+00). In everyone else (n=46492): diff = -0.006 (p=7.75e-01). Treatment benefit is restricted to KRAS+ males.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable model restricted to pdl1_tps>=0.5, treatment_pembrolizumab adjusted main effect on pfs_months remains null (no PD-L1-stratum benefit).

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ all base predictors restricted to pdl1_tps>=0.5
analyses.result_summary: In PD-L1 high subset (n=10749): treatment_pembrolizumab coef = -0.0026 months (p=8.56e-01); null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_pembrolizumab × treatment_sotorasib interaction on pfs_months is non-zero (synergy or antagonism between concomitant therapies).
treatment_sotorasib × treatment_osimertinib interaction on pfs_months is non-zero.

Across the four annotated treatments, only treatment_sotorasib has a usable PFS benefit, and that benefit is restricted to patients with kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=0; treatment_pembrolizumab, treatment_olaparib, and treatment_osimertinib have null adjusted PFS effects everywhere, including in their canonical biomarker subgroups (pdl1_tps>=0.5, brca2_mutation=1, egfr_mutation=1 respectively).

The dominant predictors of pfs_months in this cohort are age_years (positive), ecog_ps (negative), stage_iv (negative), has_brain_mets (negative), albumin_g_dl (positive), kras_g12c (positive main effect), and weight_loss_pct_6mo (negative); these account for nearly all of the explained variance.

analyses.code: Combination of OLS adjusted treatment main effects, prespecified treatment×biomarker interactions, KRAS+ subgroup analyses, three-way KRAS×sex×sotorasib model, and tree-based uplift discovery.
analyses.result_summary: Sotorasib in KRAS+ males: +4.64 months PFS (p≈0); in KRAS+ females: -0.01 months (p=0.86); in KRAS- males/females: ~0 (p>>0.05). Pembrolizumab in PD-L1 high (>=0.5): -0.07 unadjusted (p=0.10) and -0.008 adjusted (p=0.64). Osimertinib in EGFR+: -0.01 (p=0.86). Olaparib in BRCA2+: +0.01 (p=0.96).

R^2 = 0.894. Strongest signed coefficients: age_years +0.168/yr, ecog_ps -1.10/grade, stage_iv -1.42, has_brain_mets -0.91, kras_g12c +0.89, hist_squam -0.72, smoke_current -0.55 vs never, albumin_g_dl +0.46/g/dL, weight_loss_pct_6mo -0.073/%, sex_female -0.20.
